summary_line: Marietta GA fee-only fiduciary RIA — $513.6M AUM, 11 employees, 5 advisors, 0 DRPs. Note: brand domain wiserwealth.com timed out on first capture; live site is wiserinvestor.com. Unusually broad niche menu visible on homepage: Retirement · Business Owners · Single Again Community · Airline Pilots · Legacy · Inheritance — including a divorce-recovery sub-segment most peers don't surface. 'No product sales or commissions.'
regulatory_note: Original captured URL wiserwealth.com timed out; firm's live site is at wiserinvestor.com. Both refer to same legal entity (CRD 125282, 'WISER WEALTH MANAGEMENT, INC').

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 125282 — 11 employees, 5 advisors, $513,631,706 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'WISER WEALTH MANAGEMENT, INC.'

Site capture: homepage only at wiserinvestor.com (the wiserwealth.com domain timed out). Hero H1: 'Guiding you to financial freedom through life's pivotal moments.' Six niche tiles on homepage: RETIREMENT PLANNING · BUSINESS OWNERS · SINGLE AGAIN COMMUNITY · AIRLINE PILOTS · LEGACY PLANNING · INHERITANCE. 'Single Again Community' is a divorce-recovery sub-segment — unusual specificity. Tagline: 'specializes in both investment advisory services and financial consulting with no product sales or commissions.'
